title: implementer final report — verbatim with the agents/implementer.md contract
description: Matches the JSON the implementer agent emits as its final message. report_file is the OPTIONAL file-based handoff the conductor's dispatch prompt adds (spike finding: bare SendMessage replies are unreliable, so teammates also write this file).

issue.description: ISSUE-XX (or the slice id when not yet published)

acs_ticked.description: AC ids the implementer verified met, each backed by observed evidence captured in at_result/full_suite.

at_result.description: PASS/FAIL + key output of the acceptance test

linear_state_set.description: Report-only signal. The implementer NEVER sets Done — the conductor flips Done after reviewer PASS + the main-loop AC gate.

escalation.description: null, or the exact AC-vs-design mismatch needing the owner's call (AC-text drift).

report_file.description: OPTIONAL: path to the per-slice report file the implementer also wrote (conductor reads this as the reliable result channel).
